# Agents Index

This folder contains Copilot agent profiles used by the repository.

## Core

- `agi.agent.md` — autonomous engineering baseline for Aria.

## Domain-focused agents

- `azure-function-codegen-and-deployment.agent.md` — Azure Functions planning/codegen/deployment workflow.
- `azure-static-web-app.agent.md` — Azure Static Web Apps implementation and deployment workflow.
- `functions-api.agent.md` — endpoint/API implementation and validation.
- `chat-provider-stack.agent.md` — provider detect/fallback diagnostics.
- `aria-runtime-debug.agent.md` — Aria runtime state/command debugging.
- `orchestrator-dryrun-status.agent.md` — status-driven orchestrator workflows.
- `quantum-safe-execution.agent.md` — simulator-first quantum safety mode.
- `testing-and-regression.agent.md` — regression-safe test-first workflow.
- `docs-and-instructions-sync.agent.md` — metadata/docs drift reconciliation.
- `release-readiness.agent.md` — release readiness checks and risk gating.
- `database-and-telemetry.agent.md` — SQL/Cosmos/telemetry diagnostics and migrations.
- `monetization-and-subscriptions.agent.md` — subscription tiers, Stripe, referrals, feature gating.
- `dashboard-and-monitoring.agent.md` — training dashboard, GPU monitoring, live progress.
- `dataset-pipeline.agent.md` — dataset discovery, curation, validation, expansion.
- `lora-training.agent.md` — LoRA adapter training, evaluation, promotion.
- `cooking-ai.agent.md` — cooking-ai recipe agent development and testing.
- `llm-maker.agent.md` — LLM tool creation, validation, registry, MCP server.
- `dependency-and-environment.agent.md` — Python environment, deps, and build config.
- `ci-cd-pipeline.agent.md` — CI/CD orchestration, validation pipelines, deployment artifacts.
- `model-deployment.agent.md` — model quality gating, deployment strategies, rollback.
- `backup-and-recovery.agent.md` — automated backup, manifests, checksums, restore.
- `notification-system.agent.md` — desktop and email notification configuration.
- `chat-memory-and-context.agent.md` — semantic memory, embeddings, context pruning.
- `performance-profiling.agent.md` — profiling, benchmarks, regex/cache optimization.
- `chat-web-frontend.agent.md` — chat-web HTML/JS/SSE consumer and TTS integration.
- `quantum-azure-infra.agent.md` — Azure Quantum workspace, Bicep, cost monitoring.
- `lora-advanced-pipeline.agent.md` — RAG, DeepSpeed, augmentation, model serving.
- `security-and-compliance.agent.md` — CodeQL, secrets audit, auth hardening, compliance.
